raw_representation.text:
Saved-as: .github/workflows/ci.yml

```yaml
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  security-events: write

env:
  CI: true

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build · Test · Lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [18]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present --silent

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build --if-present

  codeql-sast:
    name: CodeQL SAST Analysis
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [18]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v2
        with:
          languages: javascript

      - name: Install dependencies (for CodeQL build)
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build (for CodeQL)
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Perform CodeQL analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v2
```

Notes / requirements
- Defaults applied:
  - Node.js: 18 (single-version matrix). Edit strategy.matrix.node-version to run additional versions.
  - Package manager: npm (uses npm ci). If you use yarn or pnpm, replace install steps and adjust setup-node caching.
  - Scripts assumed: lint -> npm run lint, test -> npm test, build -> npm run build. All guarded with --if-present; change if your repository uses different script names.
- SAST (CodeQL):
  - CodeQL steps are included (github/codeql-action). The built-in GITHUB_TOKEN is used automatically; no additional secret is required for public repositories.
  - For private repositories, GitHub Advanced Security may be required to enable full CodeQL features and alerts.
  - Ensure repository Actions permissions allow security-events: write (the workflow sets this).
- DAST: No DAST steps included (Enable_DAST = false).
- Save this file at: .github/workflows/ci.yml
- If you want caching tuned (e.g., explicit actions/cache for ~/.npm or node_modules), test/coverage artifact upload, test report publishing, or a Node version matrix, tell me and I will update the workflow.
